forgot-password page shows success message without revealing account existence
API route always responds with ok:true to prevent email enumeration
API route generates random token and stores in database
API route invalidates previous tokens before creating new one
API route sends email via sendEmail utility

forgot-password page displays sendHint warning when email delivery fails
forgot-password page shows email_send_failed hint when sending fails in prod

API route returns devEmailError in non-production environments
